g.text: - RN-006: A "Teoría" group should not have
more than 75 students, and a "Laboratorio" one,
- RN-007: A student may not belong to more
- RN-003: A student cannot access through
- RN-004: A student cannot have grades for
- RN-001: For a grade to be with honours, its
value must be equal to or higher than 9.
- RN-002: A student must not have more than
one grade per subject, call and academic year.
- RN-005: A grade may not be raised or lowered
